jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at NHB
jsonLd.description:
We at NHB are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!
